prompt: Create a square cinematic macro photograph of a surreal miniature New York City food-landscape rising from a vast desert of fine golden cane sugar. The scene is a detailed diorama viewed from a slightly elevated three-quarter angle with shallow depth of field, atmospheric haze, and warm glowing city lights. Add large elegant white serif text in the upper left reading MINI NYC. Build a miniature Manhattan skyline from edible materials: a central Empire State Building made from stacked glossy purple onion layers with a sparkling sugar-dusted spire; a cream-white Chrysler Building made from carved layered onion or pastry scales with a pointed spire; surrounding towers made from cucumber slices, corn cobs, stacked zucchini rounds, carrots, sugar cubes, wafers, translucent candy blocks, and vegetable cylinders. Include exactly one Statue of Liberty in the foreground, carved from bright orange carrot, standing on a tiny sugar island in a turquoise-blue lagoon. Surround the city with rolling dunes of cane sugar like sand, broccoli florets as clusters of trees, rosemary sprigs as miniature palms and street plantings, cherry tomatoes stacked vertically as a red skyscraper, and glowing miniature Times Square-style billboards along a waterfront street. The composition should feature a turquoise lagoon across the bottom third, dense edible greenery at the lower edges, the tallest purple onion tower near center-left, the white Chrysler-style tower to its right, and warm golden lights at street level. Use hyperreal macro food photography, tilt-shift miniature effect, crisp edible textures, sparkling sugar granules, soft dramatic backlighting, teal shadows, warm amber highlights, whimsical but photorealistic detail, no people, no watermark.
